configurations.title: Trails of Governor's Hill
configurations.study_desc: Shows observer counts for observations with the "Plant that the organism was found on" observation field recorded.  Some of the other observation fields listed in the Field Studies table below *might* become secondary data points at some time in the future.  They would help answer the question "what was the fauna doing there?" rather than "what was the fauna on?".
